name: wxcode-admin-forge-mes
title: Forge MES Admin
description: Industrial dark-mode Manufacturing Execution System dashboard — shop-floor plant switcher, OEE / output / downtime / scrap KPI tiles, production lines status board, inline SVG output trend chart, work-orders table, and real-time downtime alerts panel. Original archetype for discrete manufacturing operations teams.

query.en: Build me an industrial dark-mode MES admin dashboard for a discrete manufacturing plant — plant switcher navbar, OEE / output / downtime / scrap KPI tiles, production lines status board, output trend chart, work-orders table, downtime alerts panel.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Build me an industrial dark-mode MES admin dashboard for a discrete manufacturing plant — plant switcher navbar, OEE / output / downtime / scrap KPI tiles, production lines status board, output trend chart, work-orders table, downtime alerts panel.

provenance.note: original archetype; no third-party template reproduced
